description: CompositionBlack round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has short sleeves and appliqued nike swoosh logo on the frontFitSlimWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not dry clean or bleachTumble dry lowWarm ironCrafted from soft cotton fabric, this T-shirt from nike offers exemplary dry comfort, making it a great everyday choice for your healthy runs and casual days. Team this tee with jeans and running shoes for a sporty look. Add on a hooded sweatshirt for exemplary comfort during cold spells.
